g.text: NVIDIA Nsight Compute - Kernel Profiling Decision Matrix

tr.td: Optimize math operations, check FP32 units
Evaluate working set size vs L2 capacity

g.text: 🔴 Critical: Primary bottleneck. High ROI for optimization.
🟡 Balanced: No clear limit. Secondary profiling required.
🟢 Optimized: Resource underutilized. Move to next metric.

ol.li: Occupancy vs Latency: High occupancy is only useful if it hides latency.
Memory Coalescing: Ensure 32-byte alignment for global accesses.
Shared Memory: Watch out for bank conflicts (check shared_load_transactions_per_request).
